mapper.insert: INSERT INTO LQ_INQUIRY (INQUIRY_ID, USER_ID, TITLE, CONTENT, STATUS, CREATED_AT) VALUES (SEQ_LQ_INQUIRY_PK.NEXTVAL, #{userId}, #{title}, #{content}, 'PENDING', SYSDATE)
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM LQ_INQUIRY WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} ORDER BY CREATED_AT DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE LQ_INQUIRY SET TITLE = #{title}, CONTENT = #{content} WHERE INQUIRY_ID = #{inquiryId} AND STATUS = 'PENDING'
